title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 15 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/09/2025
Today, the iron ore futures on the Dalian Commodity Exchange were in the doldrums, with the most-traded I2601 contract closing at 796,down slightly by 0.31% from the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling; most steel mills were cautious and observing, while some mills made purchases at lower prices. The market transaction atmosphere was moderate.
